temporal_description:
A man with short, graying hair, seen from behind, stands in a dimly lit room. He is wearing a dark suit jacket. He is looking at a row of aquariums that line a wall in front of him. The aquariums are filled with water, gravel, and artificial plants, and small white labels are attached to the front of each tank. In the top right corner of the screen, a watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible. The camera remains stationary, focused on the man's back. The audio begins with the low, ambient hum of what sounds like aquarium filters, creating a quiet and slightly sterile atmosphere.

The scene cuts to a man in a suit and a patterned tie, who appears to be the same man from the previous shot, now seen from the side. He is in a different, warmly lit room with wood-paneled walls. He smiles and gestures with his right hand as if welcoming someone. A man's voice then cuts through the quiet, speaking in a clear and direct tone. He calls out, "Boss, here." Chinese subtitles appear at the bottom of the screen. The "风行网" watermark is still present in the top right corner. His delivery is matter-of-fact, as if he's announcing his arrival to someone he knows well. The camera is slightly shaky, suggesting it's handheld.

The camera pans slightly to the right, revealing a woman with dark, curly hair. She is wearing a patterned top with red and white elements. She looks toward the man with a neutral expression. The background remains the same warmly lit, wood-paneled interior. The "风行网" watermark is visible in the top right corner. The shot is slightly obscured by a foreground element, creating a sense of looking in from the side. Following his brief announcement, a soft, melancholic instrumental melody begins to play, featuring a gentle, slightly sorrowful tune that creates a somber and intimate mood.
